title: Cozy Vanilla+
description: A cozy, lightweight vanilla modpack that enhances the core mechanics of Minecraft with lightweight mods.
body: Cozy Vanilla+ is a lightweight vanilla enhancement pack designed to maintain the feel of regular vanilla minecraft, with some performance enhancements and other fun mods to tweak the overall format. Whether exploring new biomes with terralith, or decorating with Macaws furniture, all players will find something new to enjoy in Cozy Vanilla+.
